CS7.1 firmware Protocol V2 foundation resource spike
baseline_fixture=test/fixtures/uno-resource-baseline.txt
baseline_flash_used_bytes=14246
baseline_static_sram_used_bytes=820
environment=uno_v2
build_flag=PROTOCOL_V2_ENABLED=1
compatibility_flash_used_bytes=16768
compatibility_flash_delta_bytes=2522
compatibility_static_sram_used_bytes=882
compatibility_static_sram_delta_bytes=62
flash_used_bytes=16770
flash_available_bytes=32256
flash_delta_bytes=2524
static_sram_used_bytes=884
static_sram_available_bytes=2048
static_sram_delta_bytes=64
measurement_command=pio run -e uno_v2
scope=V2 foundation plus shared native-testable v1 dispatch and streaming v1 configuration output; no v2 framing, negotiation, or structured wire output is implemented.
